scripts.check:node: node --check scripts/lib/xueqiu_core.mjs && node --check scripts/lib/cdp_session.mjs && node --check scripts/xueqiu_browser_scraper.mjs && node --check scripts/xueqiu_comments_resume.mjs && node --check scripts/xueqiu_edge_sync.mjs && node --check scripts/xueqiu_smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/xueqiu_playwright_article_fetch.mjs && node --check scripts/bootstrap_skills.mjs && node --check .claude/skills/bingbing-xiaomei-perspective/scripts/build_corpus_manifest.mjs && node --check .claude/skills/bingbing-xiaomei-perspective/scripts/validate_skill.mjs && node --check .claude/skills/dongge-perspective/scripts/build_corpus_manifest.mjs
